name: uses-codebase-plugin
description: Expose the local USES/UFT codebase index as MCP tools and skills for Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Grounded answers for the local USES/UFT DSL repository
interface.longDescription: Connects Codex to the local USES/UFT index so questions can be answered with procedure names, file paths, line numbers, evidence blocks, and optional external LLM synthesis.
defaultPrompt: 证券代码获取的逻辑在哪里？
哪个过程会调用这个 LF 逻辑？
帮我找出这个业务规则的证据文件和行号。
